Source Matrix

Overview Search Status Snapshot Source Matrix Eval And Audit Status Demo Queries Limitations And Public-Alpha Boundaries Live-Alpha Preparation Roadmap Local Quickstart

This matrix is generated from governed source inventory records. Fixture/live/manual state is explicit so placeholders remain placeholders.

Machine-Readable Summary

Generated Public Data Summaries v0 publishes a static source summary for lite/text/files seed surfaces and future snapshot, relay, and native-client consumers.

  • Source summary JSON
source_id Label Family Posture / status Coverage depth Fixture / live / manual state Capabilities summary Current limitations Next coverage step
synthetic-fixtures Synthetic Fixtures synthetic active_fixture action_indexed Committed local fixture only; no live network access. Search, item metadata, file listing, member listing, content text, hashes, action paths. Synthetic fixture scope only; No real-world source coverage; No live network acquisition Use this as a deterministic fixture control while recorded real-source coverage is added separately.
github-releases-recorded-fixtures GitHub Releases Recorded Fixtures github_releases active_recorded_fixture representation_indexed Recorded fixtures only; no live network access. Search, item metadata, file listing, hashes, action paths. Recorded fixture scope only; No live GitHub API access; No source archive member extraction; No reviews, discussion, or issue coverage Add more recorded source families before considering any live GitHub connector behavior.
internet-archive-recorded-fixtures Internet Archive Recorded Fixtures internet_archive_recorded active_recorded_fixture representation_indexed Recorded fixtures only; no live network access. Search, item metadata, file listing, hashes. Recorded fixture scope only; No live Internet Archive API access; No scraping or crawling; No item payload fetch; No OCR/full-text source coverage Expand recorded metadata and item-file fixtures before considering any live Internet Archive connector behavior.
local-bundle-fixtures Local Bundle Fixtures local_bundle_fixtures active_fixture action_indexed Committed local fixture only; no live network access. Search, item metadata, file listing, member listing, content text, hashes, action paths. Committed fixture scope only; No arbitrary user filesystem ingestion; No public-alpha local path access; No live source probing Use the expanded fixtures as the control corpus for follow-up audit deltas, compatibility evidence expansion, and future old-platform source coverage work.
article-scan-recorded-fixtures Article Scan Recorded Fixtures article_scan_recorded active_recorded_fixture content_or_member_indexed Recorded fixtures only; no live network access. Search, item metadata, file listing, member listing, content text, hashes. Recorded fixture scope only; No real magazine scans; No copyrighted article text; No OCR engine; No PDF or image parsing; No live source access Use this fixture to validate bounded article/page result-shape checks before considering any broader scan/article source strategy.
internet-archive-placeholder Internet Archive internet_archive placeholder source_known Planning placeholder only; no connector or live access. No current search, metadata, file listing, member listing, or live probe capability. No recorded Internet Archive fixtures; No item-file listing; No metadata search; No live Internet Archive API calls Add recorded metadata and item-file fixtures for a small governed Internet Archive slice.
wayback-memento-placeholder Wayback / Memento wayback_memento placeholder source_known Planning placeholder only; no connector or live access. No current search, metadata, file listing, member listing, or live probe capability. No recorded capture fixtures; No replay or memento expansion; No live capture probing; No WARC/WACZ member indexing Add recorded temporal capture metadata fixtures before any live probing is considered.
software-heritage-placeholder Software Heritage software_heritage placeholder source_known Planning placeholder only; no connector or live access. No current search, metadata, file listing, member listing, or live probe capability. No recorded Software Heritage fixtures; No SWHID lookup; No source tree member indexing; No live Software Heritage API calls Add recorded source snapshot fixtures and provenance examples before any connector behavior.
local-files-placeholder Local Files local_files local_private_future source_known Future local/private source only; no current local-files ingestion. No current search, metadata, file listing, member listing, or live probe capability. No implemented local-files ingestion connector; No public-alpha arbitrary local path access; No local bundle fixture corpus yet Add a governed local bundle fixture corpus before any private local-files workflow.
Eureka is a Python reference backend prototype, not production. This site uses no scraping, performs no live source probes, and makes no external search calls. external baselines pending/manual; source placeholders remain placeholders.
